1. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && python -m pytest tests/unit/ -x -q --timeout=30 2>&1 | tail -20` 2. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && python -m pytest packages/erk-shared/tests/unit/ -x -q --timeout=30 -k "not test_parse_v2_details_frontmatter" 2>&1 | tail -20` 3. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/remove_objective_node.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/add_objective_node.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_objective_node.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_post_action_comment.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_apply_landed_update.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/roadmap.py 2>&1` 4. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/remove_objective_node.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/add_objective_node.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_objective_node.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_post_action_comment.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/roadmap.py 2>&1`
Report pass/fail and any errors.
